title: Generate a Todo List API from requirements
instruction: Read the README.md for requirements and create a Todo List API. You need to create: (1) app.py - Flask application with CRUD endpoints, (2) database.py - SQLite database operations, (3) test_app.py - Tests for all endpoints. The tests in test_app.py will verify your implementation. Use Flask and SQLite. Implement all features: filtering, search, pagination.
